transcript.text:
[For the first time ever on camera...]
[Insaeng Agujjim] (Braised Monkfish)
Hello everyone
I'm here to do an Agujjim mukbang
This place focuses on to-go orders
But they are planning on opening dine-in due to high demand
So I'm here to try it myself
It's called Insaeng Agujjim (Life-Agujjim) because the owner put his life on it
[Insaeng Agujjim] [Kyeonggi, Paju-si]
It's been so long
-Hello -Hello
[She is so happy to see her]
-Your face is smaller than your mask -No no
I asked my kid about you
And they went nuts
Mom, Tzuyang-nim?! Tzuyang-nim?!

Their health inspection grade A+
I heard this is rare
My husband is just very OCD
What's popular here?
It's gotta be Agujjim (Spicy Braised Monkfish)
Braised Seafood, and Braised Aljjim (Pollock Roe)
[Came over to see Tzuyang] This is my son
He's skipping tutor
Go away, you're so loud
I'll take all 3 of those
We have 5 levels of spiciness you can choose from
I'm curious
I have to find out how spicy it is
How spicy is level 5?
We put a notice - "Do not attempt in an empty stomach" "We do not take any responsibility of what happens after"
Wait a minute... No responsibility

Level 1, level 3, and level 5
Will level 5 be okay?
We really take no responsibility
The Aljjim with level 5
Seafood with level 1
Agujjim with level 3
Add octopus, please
-It'll be right up -Thank you
But don't forget that we warned you
I'm doomed
[Coming in 1 by 1]
[Can't forget about the bevs]
This one's for hangovers
I drank last night
She'll finish everything
1 octopus equals to 3 bottles of soju

That's right
Which one first?
Level 1, level 3, and level 5
Looks delicious
Lots of seafood
[Plum juice fuel]
Braised seafood first Webfoot octopus is huge
Cuttlefish too Really big
Shrimp, crab, etc
Roe
Let's get a bite of this
So good
Not too dry Just about right
The sauce is great
The sauce is incredible
It's too big for me to eat as a whole

Cut it
So soft
Can octopus be this tender?
They tend to be very tough to chew
Lots of crabs too
Everything seems so fresh This is full of meat
Delicious Webfoot octopus too
I'm a little scared because level 1 is a little spicy
I can feel it on my tongue
Will I be okay?
Check the roe
Agujjim Let's try it
This is level 3
Wow Looks tasty
The sauce is great
It's very addicting

It's not too spicy yet
Dried seaweed
Monkfish
The fat is very soft and the skin is chewy Almost like a pig's trotter
Lots of monkfish meat in here
Put this on top
Lots of meat
Everyone would love this without a doubt
I'll have to see if they have one near my house
Next
We take no responsibility
The owners left the restaurant
To take no responsibility?
This is the level 5
Some sauce first
[Maybe it's not too bad?]

I'll give it a try
Spicy!
Spicy but tasty
I'm still doing fine
It's good
It's really spicy
My eyes are going to turn red
[Made with natural spice]
Delicious
I think level 3 is the best
I love roe so much I get to eat a lot of it today
The portions are huge
If you take a look here There's barely any bean sprouts and the rest are roe and meat
And I ordered a Small plate
How? This is like a Large plate
The inside

The spice kicks in right away
But it doesn't really linger
Great stress reliever
A bite of the octopus
It cuts right off
Cuttlefish
Look how big this is
Is it usually this big?
The thickness too So meaty
Big cuttlefish are the best
Really good
This is a Small but it has a lot of food
So worth the money
[DIY flying fish roe riceballs]
Let's find the shrimp
I peeled all of them

It's so spicy but it gives so much more flavor
So soft
They're good with their seafood
Right, I had rice
1 bite
Excellent
You're full, right?
-You look like you're getting there -Not at all
How can someone that look so frail eat that much? Unbelievable
Roe on top
I'm scared I'll eat this first
Agujjim
This feels half-braised Not a lot of fish bones in here
How can this be a size Small? No way
This has to be a Large
This is almost boneless

I'm a little scared to eat this
Really spicy
I have to be careful when swallowing
Was level 3 okay? The agujjim
Level 3 is fine
Do a review for us
An honest review Not for the camera
It's really delicious I love the sauce
Spicy and very light
No dryness in the Agujjim
Our customers come to pick up to-go orders
[They plan on opening for dine-in very soon because of high demand]
Not bad
Mandarin orange juice
Cuttlefish
So tender Unbelievably tender

What's their secret?
My mom can make it like this too
I think she said you need to massage it a lot
Refreshing
Cuttlefish is a must here
Octopus head
Would you like me to re-heat the dishes for you?
Really? Thank you
It's hot again
He almost made this one less spicy for me
Let's finish this first though
Still spicy, but not as spicy as before
It's so good reheated
Yum
Tasty
This is going to be good with the sauce

The flying fish roe riceball is also popular here
It's not as spicy
But it still numbs my tongue
Really good though
-It's less spicy, right? -Yes, it's a lot less spicy
He made it again as level 3
Spice lovers really enjoy level 5 But don't ruin your stomach
Because we take zero responsibility
Here's a tip when you order from here
Level 1 really has a small kick to it
If you like Shin ramyun and Buldak noodles, then level 3 is for you
If you're a spice fanatic, then go for level 5
Level 3 is perfect for me
The more I eat this, the more I think that the bean sprouts are the spiciest
I've finished these bottles
Amazing

-Where's the food going to? -In my belly
[All of that...?]
Rice with dried seaweed
I really enjoyed it A very clean & spicy sauce
Full of seafood and roe
This definitely was a life-agujjim
1 last bite
-Thank you for enjoying our food -I had a great meal
Thanks everyone
[Tzuyang's fan]
I'm going to show this off to my friends
[Thank you for a great meal!] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
